---
title: 'Kiddos'
date: '2014-03-13T05:41:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_type: 'PAGE'
blogger_blog: 'Texas Cows and Crafts'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_page_id: '1025510297036482724'
blogger_filename: '/p/kids_2.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Texas Cows and Crafts/feed.atom'
---

Kiddos is for those little people in your life!<br />
<br />
<div style="background: #5e7a88; border-radius: 20px; box-shadow: inset 0 0px 10px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5), 0 1px 0 #000; text-align: center;">
<embed flashvars="host=picasaweb.google.com&amp;hl=en_US&amp;feat=flashalbum&amp;RGB=0x5e7a88&amp;feed=https%3A%2F%2Fpicasaweb.google.com%2Fdata%2Ffeed%2Fapi%2Fuser%2F115276805483167457930%2Falbumid%2F5988242110869362465%3Falt%3Drss%26kind%3Dphoto%26hl%3Den_US" height="229" pluginspage="http://www.macromedia.com/go/getflashplayer" src="https://photos.gstatic.com/media/slideshow.swf" type="application/x-shockwave-flash" width="344"></embed></div>
<br />
<br />
<div style="text-align: center;">
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="http://www.texascowsandcrafts.com/search/label/Pinata%20Banks"><img height="216" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-1385-71a0553f6193.jpg" width="288" /></a>&nbsp; &nbsp; <span style="font-family: Georgia, Times New Roman, serif; font-size: x-large; vertical-align: 200%;">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp;<a href="http://www.texascowsandcrafts.com/search/label/Pinata%20Banks" target="_blank">Pinata Banks</a></span></div>
</div>
<br />
<br />
<div style="text-align: center;">
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="http://www.texascowsandcrafts.com/search/label/Crayons" style="font-family: Georgia, 'Times New Roman', serif; font-size: xx-large; vertical-align: 200%;" target="_blank">Crayons</a>&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp;&nbsp;<a href="http://www.texascowsandcrafts.com/search/label/Crayons"><img height="200" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/to-20be-20sort-202012-20350-9ab38b4dede7.jpg" width="272" /></a></div>
</div>
<br />
<br />
<div style="text-align: center;">
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp;<a href="http://www.texascowsandcrafts.com/search/label/Soap"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/lego-soap-976e0bf4c14a.jpg" height="210" width="290" /></a>&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp;<span style="font-family: Georgia, Times New Roman, serif; font-size: x-large; vertical-align: 200%;">&nbsp;<a href="http://www.texascowsandcrafts.com/search/label/Soap" target="_blank">Soap</a></span></div>
</div>
<br />
<br />
